results.title: THE SAFETY AND EFFICACY OF CREATINE MONOHYDRATE ...
results.body: Basedon the best availableevidence, the ingestion of 20 g/d of creatine monohydrate for 5 d or 3-5 g/d for about 30 d will maximally increase muscle creatine. The exact dose needed to increase brain creatine is unknown, but standard loading doses have been effective at increasing brain creatine in some studies.
